title: Who made XanaNode?
summary: XanaNode is authored by Christian Siefen through Built By Bots, with the project designed for independently owned substrates.
content: The canonical project substrate identifies Christian Siefen, Built By Bots, the public repositories, branding, and support links as first-class nodes. That provenance is part of the system: people should be able to trace who authored a substrate, who maintains a tool, and where project work happens.
